---
title: "Strava Dashboard"
description: |
  A dashboard analyzing all my Strava activites and housing a maintenance log for bike service
author:
  - name: Annie Adams
date: 2026-06-26
categories: [Shiny, R]
image: images/strava_plot.png
---


<iframe src="https://annieradams.shinyapps.io/strava_dashboard/"
        width="100%" height="800px" 
        frameborder="0">
</iframe>
